sourceIdea: Build a premium educational wooden toy business for children aged 3-5 in India.
executiveSummary: Genesis Creative Studio generated a launch-ready Creative Pack for Luma Logic Cubes.

brandStrategy.positioning: Premium screen-free learning toys for early childhood development in India

targetAudience.primarySegment: Parents of children aged 3-5 in India

brandStrategy.brandPromise: Beautiful play that quietly builds logic, motor skills, and confidence.
brandStrategy.toneOfVoice: Calm, parent-friendly, clear, and lightly playful
brandStrategy.differentiation: Combines premium natural materials, parent-friendly education value, and gift-ready presentation.

brandNameRecommendation.rationale: Short, memorable, warm, and extendable across future learning products.
